title: NVIDIA’s Nemotron 3 Is... Awesome?
summary: NVIDIA released the Nemotron 3 series comprising Nano, Super, and Ultra models that combine hybrid Mamba transformer, MTP, and Latent MoE architectures. The video explains how these components differentiate Nemotron 3 from other open models.
writeup: The video covers NVIDIA's Nemotron 3 series, which spans Nano, Super, and Ultra models built on a combination of hybrid Mamba transformer layers, MTP, and Latent Mixture of Experts. It breaks down how each of these architectural components works and what sets Nemotron 3 apart from other open models. The takeaway is a component-level view of the design choices behind the series rather than a benchmark comparison.
